text:
A commit references this bug:

Author: pi
Date: Tue Jan 10 18:52:13 UTC 2017
New revision: 431125
URL: https://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/431125

Log:
  New port: audio/sratom

  Sratom is a library for serialising LV2 atoms to/from RDF,
  particularly the Turtle syntax.

  WWW: http://drobilla.net/software/sratom

  PR:		213288
  Submitted by:	Michael Beer <beerml@sigma6audio.de>
  Reviewed by:	Yuri Victorovich <yuri@rawbw.com>

Changes:
  head/audio/Makefile
  head/audio/sratom/
  head/audio/sratom/Makefile
  head/audio/sratom/distinfo
  head/audio/sratom/pkg-descr
  head/audio/sratom/pkg-plist
